note: SYNTHESIZED, not captured. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled placeholder; ST default utility strings are overridden with ORP_ sentinels so no ST prose appears. Pins the default marker ORDER: main -> worldInfoBefore -> charDescription -> charPersonality -> scenario -> worldInfoAfter -> chatHistory. The `input` block is the machine-readable feed that yields `expected.chat` (a coherent reconstruction, not adapter-verified until Phase-2 issues 11-15). Replace with a source:'captured' fixture per RUNBOOK.md when a real capture is taken.

input.description: worldInfoBefore/After, charPersonality, scenario markers each populated; single-char preset; one trailing user turn.

prompts.name: Main
prompts.content: Vornst kelbra directive: uphold the frelquam cadence.

character.name: Kaevo
character.description: Character brindle: Kaevo, a quiet dock-warden of Sill.
character.scenario: A rain-slick pier at the edge of Grennel Bay.

chatMessages.content: Kaevo, did the night skiff ever come back?

worldInfo.content: Before-lore: the Zell markets close at dusk-tide.
After-lore: tide-bells ring thrice for a missing skiff.

mustNotContain: point of view of {{user}}, using the chat history

chat.content: Vornst kelbra directive: uphold the frelquam cadence.
